title: React Component Generator
description: Generate a React component in an existing project.

name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the component?

project.x-prompt: Which project would you like to add the component to?

directory.description: Directory where the component will be created.

style.description: The file extension or preprocessor to use for style files.
style.x-prompt: Which stylesheet format would you like to use?

export.description: Export the component from the project's index.ts file.

flat.description: Create the component in the source root without an additional folder.
